_doc: ACCOUNT REGISTRY — the single fact sheet for every Kalshi account the system trades. To add an account: (1) add an entry here, (2) mirror this file into the dashboard repo (Temp/rfq_dashboard_clone/accounts.json — it must match), (3) add the KALSHI_API_KEY_ID<env_suffix> + private key (KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH<env_suffix> or inline) to .env on the box AND in the Render dashboard UI. No base-file code edits needed. Fields: key=load_settings/config label; marker=short tag (logs, fills suffix, sport policy, route 'acct'); label=Telegram/notifier display; dashboard_label=dashboard UI account name; env_suffix=KALSHI_*<suffix>; fills_file=local fill log; hf_name=gzipped name on the private HF fills mirror; allowed_sports=[] means all, else every leg's parse_leg sport must be in it; blocked_sports=reject if any leg's sport is in it; owner_takes=true only for an account the owner also trades manually (taker fills excluded from our maker book); cap_fractions=per-account dollar caps as a fraction of bankroll. Sport codes are parse_leg per-league codes (wc=World Cup, atp/wta=tennis).
